final:
module wifi_module (
    input wire clk,
    input wire connect,
    output reg [1:0] status
);
    initial begin
        status = 0; // disconnected
    end

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        case (status)
            0: if (connect) status <= 1; // trying to connect
            1: if (connect) status <= 2; // connected
            2: if (!connect) status <= 0; // disconnect
        endcase
    end
endmodule
